mapper.insert: INSERT INTO donation_order ( merchant_trade_no, article_id, amount, status, ecpay_trade_no, rtn_code, rtn_msg, paid_at ) VALUES ( #{merchantTradeNo}, #{articleId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{ecpayTradeNo}, #{rtnCode}, #{rtnMsg}, #{paidAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE donation_order SET status = 'SUCCESS', ecpay_trade_no = #{ecpayTradeNo}, rtn_code = #{rtnCode}, rtn_msg = #{rtnMsg}, paid_at = COALESCE(paid_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE merchant_trade_no = #{merchantTradeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_trade_no, article_id, amount, status, ecpay_trade_no, rtn_code, rtn_msg, created_at, paid_at, updated_at FROM donation_order WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, merchant_trade_no, article_id, amount, status, ecpay_trade_no, rtn_code, rtn_msg, created_at, paid_at, updated_at FROM donation_order WHERE merchant_trade_no = #{merchantTradeNo}
